title: MMDS — Machine-Mediated Diagram Specification
description: Structured JSON output for graph-family Mermaid diagrams produced by mmdflux.

defaults.description: Document-level defaults for omitted node/edge fields.

geometry_level.description: Geometry detail level. 'layout' includes node geometry + edge topology only. 'routed' adds edge paths, bounds, and routing metadata.

shape.description: Default node shape used when a node omits the shape field.

stroke.description: Default edge stroke used when an edge omits stroke.

arrow_start.description: Default source-end marker used when an edge omits arrow_start.

arrow_end.description: Default target-end marker used when an edge omits arrow_end.

bounds.description: Overall diagram bounds in MMDS layout space.

shape.description: Shape name in snake_case. If omitted, consumers should use defaults.node.shape.

position.description: Center position in unitless MMDS layout space.

size.description: Node bounding box dimensions in unitless MMDS layout space.

id.description: Deterministic edge identifier (e.g., 'e0', 'e1') in declaration order.

stroke.description: Stroke style. If omitted, consumers should use defaults.edge.stroke.

arrow_start.description: Arrow at source end. If omitted, consumers should use defaults.edge.arrow_start.

arrow_end.description: Arrow at target end. If omitted, consumers should use defaults.edge.arrow_end.

path.description: Routed edge path as [x, y] coordinate pairs in unitless MMDS layout space. Routed level only.

label_position.description: Label center position in unitless MMDS layout space. Routed level only.

is_backward.description: Whether this edge flows backward in the layout direction. Routed level only.

children.description: IDs of nodes directly in this subgraph.

bounds.description: Subgraph bounding box. Routed level only.

x.description: X coordinate in unitless MMDS layout space.

y.description: Y coordinate in unitless MMDS layout space.

width.description: Width in unitless MMDS layout space.

height.description: Height in unitless MMDS layout space.

width.description: Overall width in unitless MMDS layout space.

height.description: Overall height in unitless MMDS layout space.
